sprint.goal: Fix AAB action-type normalization gap causing ~700 false denials/day (#1202 KE-2) + MCP prefix match (#1209) + heredoc false-positive verification (#1208) + $(date) scanner (#1139).

senior.title: Sprint: AAB normalization + MCP prefix + heredoc FP + date scanner
senior.note: Sequence: (1) #1209 first — quick win ~1h, aab.ts exact-match → startsWith() for MCP server names. (2) #1202 KE-2 — flagship 3-5d, strip rtk/time/timeout prefixes in aab.ts, classify embedded sub-ops, emit UnknownActionType WARNING event. (3) #1208 — verify if heredoc body-text false-positive still live after #1212; patch commandViolation full-string includes in definitions.ts:1229-1232 if so. (4) #1139 — add read-only subshell allowlist in command-scanner.ts for $(date +format) pattern.
